sourceMovie.title: Despicable Me 4
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Despicable Me 4 works as a family movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The family and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Despicable Me
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Despicable Me 4 clicked for you, Despicable Me (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Despicable Me 4 clicked for you, Minions: The Rise of Gru (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Despicable Me 4?
faq.answer: Try Despicable Me, Minions: The Rise of Gru, DC League of Super-Pets—each shares DNA with Despicable Me 4 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Despicable Me 4?
faq.answer: Despicable Me 4 (2024) is best described as Family, Comedy, Animation, Science Fiction, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Despicable Me 4 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Despicable Me Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
